/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/line_iterator.dir/test/line_iterator_test.cpp.o  -o /home/linzp/catkin_op/devel/lib/base_local_planner/line_iterator   -L/home/linzp/catkin_op/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/linzp/catkin_op/build/gtest:/home/linzp/catkin_op/build/gtest/lib ../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
